features.name: Backlog Core
features.description: Validates configuration loading, state records, and frontmatter contracts that make backlog items readable and reviewable.

features.name: Workitem Operations
features.description: Validates canonical backlog item creation, update templates, and repo-local workflow operations.

features.name: Integrity Operations
features.description: Validates read-only integrity checks for stale drift, duplicate metadata, and graph hygiene.

features.name: Topic Operations
features.description: Validates topic lifecycle audit surfaces and hygiene reporting without mutating backlog content.

features.name: CLI Workflow
features.description: Validates command-line backlog workflows, repository discovery, bounded core commands, and reviewable webview data exposure.
